Step Action:
Setup: This test requires 4 Government Gateway accounts. 2 Traders and 2 Agents. Agent 1 has been setup to be linked to Trader 1 whilst Agent 2 has been setup to be linked to Trader 2.

Test: In this test, we will Login as Trader 1, give them the  permissions to be a Trader in charge of agents and then add Agent 1 and Agent 2. This will mean Agent 2 can also do work for Trader 1. We will then Login as Agent 2 and check that both Trader 1 and Trader 2 appear underneath Companies, then Log out. After waiting 10 minutes, we will then log back in as Agent 2 and complete a CHEDPP notification, using the "For a different organisation option". 

Teardown: Login as Trader 1 and make them an agent again to reset the links with Agent 1 and Agent 2
